ats_utilities.generator.igenerator module¶

igenerator.py

Info

Defines abstract class IGenerator with method(s). Creates an interface for template-based file generation from .tgz archives.

class ats_utilities.generator.igenerator.IGenerator[source]¶

Bases: IContextSupport, ABC

Defines abstract class IGenerator with method(s). Creates an interface for template-based file generation from .tgz archives.

It defines:

methods:
get_shared_context - Returns the shared context.
prepare_template_values - Prepares template values.
generate - Generates project modules/files from a .tgz archive.
is_initialized - Checks if the generator component is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the generator as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract generate(generator_bundle: GenParamsBundle) → bool[source]¶

Generates project modules/files from a .tgz archive.

Parameters:

generator_bundle (<GenParamsBundle>) – Generator bundle containing template generation parameters.

Returns:

True if generation was successful, False otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract get_shared_context() → ContextBundle[source]¶

Returns the shared context.

Returns:

Shared context.

Return type:

<ContextBundle>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if generator component is initialized.

Returns:

<True> if successful, <False> otherwise.

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

abstract prepare_template_values(template_values: Mapping[str, str]) → dict[str, str][source]¶

Prepares template values.

Parameters:

template_values (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Input replacement values.

Returns:

The updated template values dictionary.

Return type:

<dict[str, str]>

Exceptions:

None.
